title: Fix design-ready toggle and admin login/authentication on live app

requirements.text: Fix the 'Is your design ready?' option selector on the QuotationRequestPage so that clicking Yes/No options visually updates the selected state and correctly stores the chosen value. The toggle must respond to user interaction and reflect the active selection with proper styling.

quotes: Is your design ready? Option was not changing fix that

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Yes' highlights the Yes option and deselects No
Clicking 'No' highlights the No option and deselects Yes
The selected value is correctly passed when the quotation form is submitted
The toggle state is visually distinct (e.g., filled/colored vs. outline) for selected vs. unselected

requirements.text: Fix the admin authentication and routing logic so that on the live production app, a valid admin login (via email/password) correctly redirects to the Admin Dashboard instead of showing 'Go to Admin Setup' or 'Return to Home'. Investigate the AdminGuard and AdminLoginPage components: ensure session storage keys and values are written and read consistently, and that the admin-exists check and credential verification work correctly in production (not just in draft/preview). The fix must make email/password admin login work reliably on the deployed app.

quotes: when i log in on live app web pages not opening Admin Dashboard its showing go to admin setup or retun to home
i cant login with my gmail and password

acceptanceCriteria: Entering valid admin email and password on the live app redirects to /admin/dashboard
AdminGuard correctly reads the session and grants access to admin routes after login
The 'Go to Admin Setup' page is NOT shown to a user who has successfully authenticated with valid admin credentials
If no admin exists yet, the setup page is shown; if admin exists and credentials are valid, the dashboard is shown
Admin login via email/password works on the deployed/live app URL, not just in draft mode

requirements.text: Add a clearly visible, standalone 'Admin Login' link or button on the main site (e.g., in the footer or as a small discreet link on the HomePage) so admins can always navigate directly to /admin/login without needing to know the URL. This provides a reliable alternative entry point to the admin area.

quotes: if not clear make another way to login admin page

acceptanceCriteria: A link or button labeled 'Admin Login' is visible on the live site (e.g., in the footer)
Clicking it navigates to the /admin/login route
The link is unobtrusive and does not disrupt the customer-facing design

constraints: Do not change the backend admin credential storage or hashing logic unless it is confirmed to be the root cause of the login failure
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or dashboard sections
Changing the Internet Identity login flow
